<!-- dropbox: https://www.dropbox.com/preview/CbDD_Dienstordner/literatur/altes%20corpus/chunked/chunked/Band11_chunk005.pdf#page=16 -->
<!-- citation-page-top: Band11 p230 -->

LANDKREIS BERCHTESGADEN · HÖGLWÖRTH


[[File:Band11_chunk005_p016_img001.jpg|thumb]]



[[File:Band11_chunk005_p016_img002.jpg|thumb|W, Maria als Schmerzensmutter]]



----
23
<!-- citation-page-bottom: Band11 p231 -->
